en.QUEST_TAKEN_FROM_TABLE: My parents were farmers too, so it should be easy way to earn some lunars. I need to find this Rolf.
en.QUEST_GIVEN_FROM_ROLF: Rolf gave me the key to his field. He said something about "weeds that might bite you." He sounded calm, but it was best to be prepared. I need to bring him 10 cobs of corn and 10 turnips.
en.WEEDS_BEATEN: By Sylvar's roots, those weeds have truly come to life. Interesting topic, it might be worth investigating, but first, it might be worth praying at a shrine to Ashe.
en.GIVEN_CORN: Corn given away. He is going to make salad or something.
en.GIVEN_TURNIP: He said he'd make me something with the turnip. I'm not a fan of it, but whatever, it might come in handy.
en.FINISH: Mission accomplished, it took some digging and fighting but at least I earned something.
